home.heroTitle: Your Trusted Partner in National Defense Technology
home.heroSubtitle: We develop end-to-end defense technologies, from RF and communication systems to target aircraft, anti-drone solutions and control software.
home.aboutBody: Sitare Defense Technologies is an engineering-driven technology company developing electronic, mechanical, and software solutions for unmanned aerial systems and the defense industry. Our R&D team designs, manufactures, and fields domestic solutions across a wide range of disciplines, from RF and communication hardware to target aircraft platforms, anti-drone systems, and flight control software.
home.aboutBodySecondary: We manage every stage in-house, from prototyping to series production, offering our customers fast, flexible, and sustainable supply capability.
home.missionBody: To contribute to our country's deterrence capacity by developing reliable, high-performance defense systems built on domestic engineering strength.
home.visionBody: To become an export-oriented defense technology company recognized as a regional reference in RF, autonomous platforms, and control software.
home.capabilitiesSubtitle: Explore our four core competency areas in detail on the What We Do page.
home.ctaTitle: Let's work together on your project
home.ctaBody: Get in touch with us to learn more about our products and technical capabilities.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.subtitle: We provide end-to-end engineering and manufacturing solutions across four core competency areas.

rf.title: RF & Communications
rf.summary: High-frequency RF design and communication boards
rf.body: We design multi-channel RF transceiver boards, antenna systems, and secure data link solutions for unmanned systems. Our multi-port RF modules with SMA connectors are developed to meet long-range, low-latency communication requirements.
bullets: Secure and encrypted data link solutions
Communication resilient to electronic warfare environments

antiDrone.title: Anti-Drone
antiDrone.body: We develop interceptor platforms providing detection, tracking, and response capability against small UAS threats. Our multi-rotor interceptor vehicles are optimized for rapid engagement and effective response after target acquisition. Our flagship product in this domain is HUMBARA, a counter-measure system with AI-assisted autonomous guidance.
bullets: Rapid engagement and autonomous approach algorithms
antiDrone.viewProducts: See HUMBARA counter-measure system technical specifications on the Products page.

targetAircraft.title: Target Aircraft
targetAircraft.summary: Target aircraft platforms for training and testing
targetAircraft.body: We develop fiber-reinforced composite target aircraft platforms for use in air defense training and live-fire tests. Our CK-0 and CK-1 platforms are positioned to meet different range and payload capacity requirements.
targetAircraft.viewProducts: See CK-0 and CK-1 technical specifications on the Products page.

control.title: Control & Software
control.summary: Flight control, autopilot, and ground control software
control.body: We develop flight control computers, autopilot algorithms, and ground control station (GCS) software in-house for our autonomous platforms. We design every layer end-to-end, from real-time embedded software to the operator interface. For high-precision positioning needs, we design our own RTK/GNSS navigation kits.
bullets: Flight control computer and autopilot software

ck0.name: CK-0 Target Aircraft
ck0.description: Lightweight-class target aircraft platform with a fiber-reinforced ABS composite airframe.

ck1.name: CK-1 Target Aircraft
ck1.description: Mid-class target aircraft platform offering extended range and payload capacity.

antiDrone.name: Anti-Drone Interceptor Platform
antiDrone.description: A multi-rotor interceptor system developed for rapid response to small UAS threats. Compact and extended airframe options allow adaptation to different mission profiles.

humbara.name: HUMBARA Counter-Measure System
humbara.description: A multi-rotor counter-measure platform with AI-assisted autonomous guidance capable of detecting and neutralizing air and ground threats. Supports automatic GNSS and radar-based guidance, autonomous target recognition via a guidance camera, and operator-controlled manual engagement modes. Enables simultaneous control of 4 vehicles from a single station, in line with the swarm concept.

rfModule.name: RF Communication Board
rfModule.description: A high-frequency RF transceiver board with multiple SMA connectors. Designed for secure, low-latency data communication on unmanned platforms.

rtkModule.name: RTK/GNSS Navigation Kit
rtkModule.description: A dual-frequency RTK GNSS module based on the u-blox ZED-F9P. Designed for autonomous navigation and precision positioning applications requiring centimeter-level location accuracy.

footer.description: Sitare Defense Technologies develops engineering solutions in RF, anti-drone, target aircraft, and control software.
